accurate.why: All claims are accurate and consistent with the bill text.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; all provisions traceable to the bill text.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the bill as FY2025 legislative branch appropriations.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Notes amendments to Energy Policy Act, Legislative Branch Appropriations Act 1992, and Title 5 fiduciary clarification.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes exceptions for law enforcement on computer network restriction and waiver option for telecom ban.

effective_dates.why: Notes FY2025 applicability, telecom ban effective FY2025 or 2026, and Capitol Police training approval.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers all major funding recipients and key policy riders.

concise.why: Appropriately detailed for a complex bill.

correct_entities.why: Correctly names Huawei, ZTE, Capitol Police Board, and relevant legislative references.

correct_figures.why: Vehicle lease cap of $1,000/month and other figures accurately stated.
